violations.description: Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. -Griddles used to cook protein not under the vent hood.

Heating, ventilation, and air conditioning. — --Mechanical ventilation was not sufficient to keep rooms free of excessive heat, condensation, vapors, smoke, fumes or obnoxious odors. -Griddles used to cook protein not under a vent hood.
